forward_src:
def forward(self, **inputs):
    valid_labels = {
        "Refund_not_showing_up", "activate_my_card", "age_limit", "apple_pay_or_google_pay",
        "atm_support", "automatic_top_up", "balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer",
        "balance_not_updated_after_cheque_or_cash_deposit", "beneficiary_not_allowed",
        "cancel_transfer", "card_about_to_expire", "card_acceptance", "card_arrival",
        "card_delivery_estimate", "card_linking", "card_not_working", "card_payment_fee_charged",
        "card_payment_not_recognised", "card_payment_wrong_exchange_rate", "card_swallowed",
        "cash_withdrawal_charge", "cash_withdrawal_not_recognised", "change_pin",
        "compromised_card", "contactless_not_working", "country_support", "declined_card_payment",
        "declined_cash_withdrawal", "declined_transfer", "direct_debit_payment_not_recognised",
        "disposable_card_limits", "edit_personal_details", "exchange_charge", "exchange_rate",
        "exchange_via_app", "extra_charge_on_statement", "failed_transfer", "fiat_currency_support",
        "get_disposable_virtual_card", "get_physical_card", "getting_spare_card",
        "getting_virtual_card", "lost_or_stolen_card", "lost_or_stolen_phone",
        "order_physical_card", "passcode_forgotten", "pending_card_payment",
        "pending_cash_withdrawal", "pending_top_up", "pending_transfer", "pin_blocked",
        "receiving_money", "request_refund", "reverted_card_payment?",
        "supported_cards_and_currencies", "terminate_account", "top_up_by_bank_transfer_charge",
        "top_up_by_card_charge", "top_up_by_cash_or_cheque", "top_up_failed", "top_up_limits",
        "top_up_reverted", "topping_up_by_card", "transaction_charged_twice",
        "transfer_fee_charged", "transfer_into_account", "transfer_not_received_by_recipient",
        "transfer_timing", "unable_to_verify_identity", "verify_my_identity",
        "verify_source_of_funds", "verify_top_up", "virtual_card_not_working",
        "visa_or_mastercard", "why_verify_identity", "wrong_amount_of_cash_received",
        "wrong_exchange_rate_for_cash_withdrawal",
    }

    def normalize(lbl):
        if not isinstance(lbl, str):
            return ""
        s = lbl.strip().strip("'\"`.,;: ").strip()
        if s in valid_labels:
            return s
        low = s.lower()
        for v in valid_labels:
            if v.lower() == low:
                return v
        # try removing trailing '?' or adding it back
        if s.endswith("?"):
            base = s[:-1]
            for v in valid_labels:
                if v.lower() == base.lower():
                    return v
        else:
            for v in valid_labels:
                if v.lower() == (s + "?").lower():
                    return v
        return ""

    text = inputs.get("text", "")

    try:
        cand_pred = self.candidates(text=text)
        raw_cands = cand_pred.candidate_intents or []
    except Exception:
        raw_cands = []

    if isinstance(raw_cands, str):
        raw_cands = [c for c in raw_cands.replace("\n", ",").split(",")]

    cands = []
    for c in raw_cands:
        n = normalize(c)
        if n and n not in cands:
            cands.append(n)

    # Heuristic candidate injection based on strong textual cues, to give the
    # disambiguator a fighting chance even if the candidate stage missed them.
    low_text = text.lower()

    def add(lbl):
        if lbl in valid_labels and lbl not in cands:
            cands.append(lbl)

    # Recurring / scheduled top-up cues
    if any(k in low_text for k in [
        "interval", "intervals", "regularly", "every month", "every week",
        "recurring", "automatic", "automatically", "schedule", "scheduled",
        "set up to add", "set up a top", "standing order", "periodically"
    ]):
        if "top" in low_text or "add money" in low_text or "add funds" in low_text or "deposit" in low_text:
            add("automatic_top_up")

    # Reverted card payment cues
    if any(k in low_text for k in [
        "payment back", "money back into", "received the payment back",
        "came back", "returned to my account", "reversed", "reverted",
        "got my money back", "payment was returned"
    ]):
        add("reverted_card_payment?")
        add("Refund_not_showing_up")
        add("request_refund")

    # Missing refund cues
    if "refund" in low_text and any(k in low_text for k in [
        "haven't received", "not received", "not showing", "where is my refund",
        "still waiting", "no refund"
    ]):
        add("Refund_not_showing_up")

    # Card/PIN not arrived
    if any(k in low_text for k in ["haven't received my card", "card hasn't arrived",
                                    "where is my card", "haven't gotten my card",
                                    "haven't received my pin", "pin hasn't arrived"]):
        add("card_arrival")
        add("get_physical_card")

    if not cands:
        cands = sorted(valid_labels)

    # Cap candidates to keep the chooser focused
    if len(cands) > 12:
        cands = cands[:12]

    try:
        ana_pred = self.analyze(text=text, candidate_intents=cands)
        analysis = ana_pred.analysis or ""
    except Exception:
        analysis = ""

    try:
        chosen = self.choose(text=text, candidate_intents=cands, analysis=str(analysis))
        intent = normalize(chosen.intent)
    except Exception:
        intent = ""

    if not intent:
        intent = cands[0] if cands else "card_not_working"

    return dspy.Prediction(intent=str(intent))
predictors_src:
PREDICTORS = {
    'candidates': dspy.ChainOfThought(dspy.Signature(
        'text: str -> candidate_intents: list[str]',
        (
            "You are helping classify a retail-banking customer message for the BANKING77 dataset.\n"
            "Given the customer's message, propose 4-7 plausible candidate intent labels (snake_case) "
            "from the BANKING77 label set, ordered from most to least likely. Think carefully about what "
            "the customer is ACTUALLY trying to accomplish, not just surface keywords. ALWAYS include "
            "competing/easily-confused labels as candidates so the next stage can disambiguate.\n\n"
            "Critical distinctions and traps:\n"
            "- 'Can I add money in intervals/regularly/automatically/recurring top-up' = automatic_top_up. "
            "  top_up_limits is about MAXIMUM amount limits, NOT scheduling/recurring.\n"
            "- 'A payment came back / was returned / reversed / I got the money back but kept the item' = "
            "  reverted_card_payment?. Refund_not_showing_up is when an EXPECTED refund is MISSING. "
            "  request_refund is when the user wants to REQUEST a refund.\n"
            "- 'I haven't received my PIN/card yet', 'where is my card/PIN' = card_arrival or "
            "  get_physical_card. passcode_forgotten is ONLY for forgotten existing PIN.\n"
            "- 'someone else is using my card / unauthorized use' = compromised_card.\n"
            "- 'lost/stolen' card vs phone matters.\n"
            "- 'pending' (waiting), 'declined' (rejected), 'failed' (transfer failed), 'reverted' (reversed), "
            "  'not recognised' (unknown on statement) are distinct.\n"
            "- 'verify_my_identity' (how to) vs 'unable_to_verify_identity' (it failed) vs "
            "  'why_verify_identity' (why) vs 'verify_source_of_funds'.\n"
            "- 'Is X card / currency / country supported?' = supported_cards_and_currencies / "
            "  visa_or_mastercard / fiat_currency_support / country_support / card_acceptance.\n"
            "- Fee/charge questions = *_charge / *_fee_charged intents.\n\n"
            "The 77 valid labels are:\n"
            "Refund_not_showing_up, activate_my_card, age_limit, apple_pay_or_google_pay, atm_support, automatic_top_up, "
            "balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, balance_not_updated_after_cheque_or_cash_deposit, beneficiary_not_allowed, "
            "cancel_transfer, card_about_to_expire, card_acceptance, card_arrival, card_delivery_estimate, card_linking, "
            "card_not_working, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, card_payment_wrong_exchange_rate, "
            "card_swallowed, cash_withdrawal_charge, cash_withdrawal_not_recognised, change_pin, compromised_card, "
            "contactless_not_working, country_support, declined_card_payment, declined_cash_withdrawal, declined_transfer, "
            "direct_debit_payment_not_recognised, disposable_card_limits, edit_personal_details, exchange_charge, exchange_rate, "
            "exchange_via_app, extra_charge_on_statement, failed_transfer, fiat_currency_support, get_disposable_virtual_card, "
            "get_physical_card, getting_spare_card, getting_virtual_card, lost_or_stolen_card, lost_or_stolen_phone, "
            "order_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_card_payment, pending_cash_withdrawal, pending_top_up, "
            "pending_transfer, pin_blocked, receiving_money, request_refund, reverted_card_payment?, "
            "supported_cards_and_currencies, terminate_account, top_up_by_bank_transfer_charge, top_up_by_card_charge, "
            "top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_failed, top_up_limits, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, "
            "transaction_charged_twice, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_not_received_by_recipient, "
            "transfer_timing, unable_to_verify_identity, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds, verify_top_up, "
            "virtual_card_not_working, visa_or_mastercard, why_verify_identity, wrong_amount_of_cash_received, "
            "wrong_exchange_rate_for_cash_withdrawal.\n\n"
            "Return ONLY a list of label strings from this set."
        )
    )),
    'analyze': dspy.ChainOfThought(dspy.Signature(
        'text: str, candidate_intents: list[str] -> analysis: str',
        (
            "You are analyzing a BANKING77 customer message to disambiguate among candidate intent labels.\n"
            "For EACH candidate label, write one short sentence: (a) what scenario this label covers, "
            "and (b) whether the customer's message actually matches that scenario, with a yes/no verdict.\n"
            "Be skeptical of surface keyword matches. Focus on the customer's underlying goal.\n\n"
            "Important reminders:\n"
            "- 'in intervals', 'regularly', 'every month', 'recurring', 'automatic' top-up => automatic_top_up, "
            "  NOT top_up_limits (which is about max amount).\n"
            "- 'payment came BACK to my account', 'received the payment back', 'was reversed/returned' after a "
            "  card purchase => reverted_card_payment?. This is NOT Refund_not_showing_up (which is about a "
            "  refund that NEVER ARRIVED) and NOT request_refund (which is asking to GET a refund).\n"
            "- 'haven't received card/PIN' => card_arrival, not passcode_forgotten.\n"
            "- 'someone else used my card' => compromised_card.\n\n"
            "Output a brief structured analysis."
        )
    )),
    'choose': dspy.ChainOfThought(dspy.Signature(
        'text: str, candidate_intents: list[str], analysis: str -> intent: str',
        (
            "You are the final stage of a BANKING77 intent classifier. Given the customer's message, "
            "candidate labels, and a per-candidate analysis, pick the SINGLE best label that captures "
            "the customer's true goal.\n\n"
            "Decision rules to apply:\n"
            "- If the user is asking about scheduling / recurring / interval top-ups, pick automatic_top_up "
            "  (NOT top_up_limits, which is only about maximum amounts).\n"
            "- If the user describes a card payment that came BACK / was reversed / they got the money back "
            "  while keeping the item, pick reverted_card_payment? (NOT Refund_not_showing_up, NOT request_refund).\n"
            "- Refund_not_showing_up is specifically when an EXPECTED refund has NOT arrived.\n"
            "- request_refund is when the user is ASKING to be refunded.\n"
            "- 'haven't received card/PIN yet' => card_arrival; passcode_forgotten is only for forgotten existing PIN.\n"
            "- 'someone else used my card' => compromised_card; 'card lost/stolen' => lost_or_stolen_card.\n"
            "- Distinguish pending / declined / failed / reverted / not_recognised carefully.\n\n"
            "Output ONLY the chosen label verbatim from the candidate list, with no extra words or punctuation."
        )
    )),
}
